item.title: I just wanted to see him for Easter...
item.description: His crazy family has been indoctrinating him into their conspiracy theories and recently tried to give my dog Ivermectin. Despite my best efforts it's 30 vs 1. After I get home from Easter I'm officially cutting contact. The thought of never seeing him again breaks my heart but the man who raised me died long ago. I'm not sure how my sisters will react and I'm unsure on how to even tell him. Maybe one day I will have the courage but right now I just want to lay down and cry. Happy Easter Imgur...
item.dc:creator: Dragonspiller

item.title: Surprise Easter kittens!
item.description:
I picked up Pepa and Julietta this morning. They were super scared and hid behind my toilet. No one was expecting them to give birth so soon! Look at the little baby under Julietta! She’s already being a good second mom.
This was a video, but Imgur is acting up. This little guy was cold to to touch, but moving around a lot. It was nerve wracking to move them, but the tile floor was cold.
I tried here first. It was already set up, but she must have been too scared to use it. She kept leaving to hide behind the toilet.
I set up this nursery for the cats with some more cover. I ask Julieta to please use this as her birthing suite. I tried to make behind the toilet an unsuitable location. They’re both in there now.
Clean towel, safe space, and a heating pad. Mama is purring loudly and all of the babies are moving around a lot. I hope she and the babies get a good night of sleep. She came from a loud, crowded environment so I hope she finds peace here. The Imgur community is amazing and has asked how they can help my fosters. We are always in need of supplies! There is a wishlist linked if you’d like to send some kitty things our way. :) https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/1CWKEHIN8OBJP?ref_=wl_share
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: The crazy thing about this, is no one knows where the 200,000 tons of excavated rock went after the people carved it. Not a single trace of it anywhere near. The rock being carved is also incredibly strong, it isn't just soft limestone.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: My grandmother’s Ukrainian painted egg collection
item.description:
This is a collection of painted eggs my grandmother had collected that I was recently shown. Some of them are actually hollowed out egg shells, others are wooden, and there are a couple of ceramic eggs. I was told that many of these came from Ukraine but I cannot verify the history or origin of any of them. Enjoy!
This is a wood egg that opens up
This one is an actual egg shell.
Another view of the same egg.
Another real egg, the detail on these is amazing. They are all the size of a medium chicken egg, so not very large.
Another real one, this is the first side.
And the other side.
One more real one, side a.
Side b.
Another wooden egg that opens up.
A slightly larger wood egg that doesn’t open.
One of the ceramic eggs, harder to photograph but obviously glazed and relatively heavy.
And the last ceramic one. Thanks for looking and happy Easter! Or better yet, happy zombie Jesus day! ?‍♂️
Pet tax, Oliver in back and old lady Shilo getting their creek on.
item.dc:creator: RadmonCake

item.title: What did we do to deserve dogs?
item.description: While I have your attention we're looking for some help for my friend and his dog. Little Siggy is suffering from kidney issues just a couple months after they managed to get her brother out of spinal issues. They would really appreciate your help. This is the man who saved me from killing myself earlier this year and I just want to help him so if you can spare something, please send it his way. https://www.gofundme.com/f/siggys-kidneys Happy Easter :)
item.dc:creator: thedeadredhead

item.title: Thank You, IMGUR, For Sending Me Home. This Was Truly Amazing Of You.
item.description:
(I will gladly trade custom abstract art for any help towards their needs) I’m without words. I am just relieved, grateful, and feeling so blessed to have met my nephew Robbie- and I cannot wait to be able to come and visit them again. My sister has a strong spirit- and is set up to start counselling shortly- but I’m so scared for her and my nephew and all of the needs they have piling up. Diapers, Formula, UTILITIES, Rent without a partner…. Etc etc etc I know you all have helped me so much- and I hope a few of you may be able to help her, too.
It was a rocky ride on 3 flights (should’ve been one but delays / staff shortages etc caused a hiccup) with a long layover but I made it in one piece!
I have truly never loved someone so much. So fast. My heart feels full. BULLYS/TROLLS STOP HERE: A list of their needs- plus much more that I can’t think of as a non parent and new uncle- and links to help can be found in the “about” section of my profile or I’m happy to share ANY info upon request xo If you’re in a position to help- either directly or via an abstract art commission (see my posts or request photos)- please do reach out- or see the list of supplies and bills mentioned above. We do have a PayPal, an interac e transfer address, an email eligible for Canadian gift cards, etc. Again- all can be found in my profiles “about” section or be shared upon request. TLDR: op couldn’t afford to see his sister or nephew during Easter / a dark and scary time. IMGUR gave him a plane ticket and sent him home to give the emotional support his family needs.
item.dc:creator: coastalabstracts
